notes: Same pod as 025b (57phocn1ibgkha), same ~5% pod-slow variance. 025b and 025c tied on val@4000 (1.1079 vs 1.1080); 025b slightly ahead on pre-quant EMA (1.06917 vs 1.06969). Per-pass differentiation is NOT load-bearing — shared frozen routing (025b) is sufficient and simpler.
